# reclaimit — Developer Disk Space Analyzer

## What is reclaimit?

A fast, safe Go CLI for reclaimable disk space analysis on developer workstations. Unlike `du` or `ncdu` which just show sizes, reclaimit understands developer-specific cleanup patterns and lets you review before deleting.

## Key Features

- **Developer-aware**: 20+ patterns for `node_modules`, `.venv`, `__pycache__`, Docker layers, build caches
- **Three output modes**: plain text, Markdown (tables + Mermaid), interactive TUI
- **Safe by design**: Preview before delete, `--yes` required, never deletes repo root
- **Single binary**: No dependencies, ~10MB Go binary
- **Cross-platform**: Linux, macOS, Windows
- **Docker image**: Non-root distroless on GHCR

## Comparison vs Alternatives

| Feature | reclaimit | `du`/`ncdu` | `gdu` | `du-dust` |
|---------|-----------|-------------|-------|-----------|
| Developer-aware patterns | ✅ | ❌ | ❌ | ❌ |
| Safe delete preview | ✅ | ❌ | ❌ | ❌ |
| Markdown reports | ✅ | ❌ | ❌ | ❌ |
| Repository grouping | ✅ | ❌ | ❌ | ❌ |
| Docker image | ✅ | ❌ | ❌ | ❌ |

## Install

```bash
# Homebrew
brew install svg153/reclaimit/reclaimit

# Universal script
curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/svg153/reclaimit/main/install.sh | bash

# Go install
go install github.com/svg153/reclaimit@latest
```

## Usage

```bash
# Generate Markdown report
reclaimit analyze --root "$HOME" --format markdown --out report.md

# Interactive cleanup
reclaimit tui --root "$HOME"

# Clean reviewed targets
reclaimit clean --root "$HOME" --include-category python-venv --yes
```

## Quick Install

```bash
curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/svg153/reclaimit/main/install.sh | bash
```
